summary: The directory name where 'write_do_lec' will write verification files when the 'write_lec_files' attribute is 'true'. The directory will be created if it does not already exist, and will overwrite an existing directory of the same name. A %s in the string is replaced with the design name (e.g. it will overwrite the directory for the same design but not for a different design). A %d in the string is replaced with a unique integer to avoid overwriting any existing directory.
